---
title: "About me"
---

```{=html}
<section class="about-layout">
  <div class="about-intro-row">
  <div class="about-photo-column">
    <div class="about-photo-slot" aria-label="Photo placeholder">
      <p class="about-photo-slot__title">Photo space</p>
      <p class="about-photo-slot__hint">Need to add my image here</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-content-column">
```
Add paragraph about me here

```{=html}
  </div>
  </div>
```

## Contact


- Email: robshaw03@icloud.com / robert.shaw5@mail.dcu.ie
- LinkedIn: 

```{=html}
</section>
```
